emphasis.description: Focused on scalable architectures and backend integrations.

about.title: About Me
about.subTitle: My introduction
about.description: Developer with 5+ years of experience delivering scalable solutions across banking, fintech and enterprise environments. Focused on frontend architecture using React, Angular, Design Systems and Microfrontends, while expanding into Frontend Specialist development with Node.js, Python and cloud-based workflows. Experience working with scalable applications, backend integrations, CI/CD pipelines and modern engineering practices using AWS and Azure DevOps.

skills.title: Expertise
skills.subTitle: Core technical areas
skills.frontendDesc: Component-driven architectures, design systems, and cross-platform development.
skills.backendDesc: Service layers, BFF patterns, and resilient API integrations.
skills.devopsDesc: Automated delivery pipelines, containerization, and cloud infrastructure on AWS.
skills.architectureDesc: Modular system design, monorepo strategies, and engineering standards at scale.

qualification.title: Qualification
qualification.subTitle: My personal journey
qualification.pos: Postgraduate in Software Architecture, Data Science, and Cybersecurity

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.subTitle: Most recent work
portfolio.psi: Responsive landing page for a private practice psychology clinic. Custom design, performance-focused.
portfolio.dogs: Full-featured social network built with React   authentication, feeds, user profiles, and media upload.
portfolio.tweets: Twitter data collection tool with API integration, content filtering, and real-time display.

testimonial.title: Testimonial
testimonial.firstClient: Senior Test Analyst same team at Hyperlocal.
testimonial.firstDescription: It's a pleasure to work with and recommend André Leite. A focused who consistently delivers in Front-End and Mobile. He stood out for the quality of his solutions and his ability to drive results in a collaborative environment.
testimonial.secondClient: Software Developer same team at Hyperlocal.
testimonial.secondDescription: Working and sharing knowledge with André has always been highly productive. He is dedicated to delivering well-structured, logical solutions that directly serve the business.
